title_en: Live coverage: SpaceX to launch reentry capsule demo mission called ‘Starfall’
summary_en: The mission is the debut of a new reentry capsule developed by SpaceX that weighs about 2,100 kg (4,600 lbs). Liftoff from pad 40 at Cape Canaveral Space Force Station is scheduled for 6:53 a.m. EDT (1053 UTC).

title_en: Webb finds clues to ancient origin of Comet 3I/ATLAS
summary_en: The third identified interstellar comet in human history has a surprising chemical makeup, raising questions as to how common, or unusual, conditions in our own Solar System may be.

title_en: NASA’s Nancy Grace Roman Space Telescope arrives in Florida

title_en: SpaceX to launches 24 Starlink satellites on Falcon 9 rocket from Vandenberg
summary_en: The Starlink 17-28 mission is the 58th mission launching the broadband satellites into low Earth orbit. Liftoff from pad 4E at Vandenberg Space Force Base occurred at 9:39:06 a.m. PDT (12:39:06 p.m. EDT / 1639:06 UTC).

summary_ru: Миссия Starlink 17-28 — 58-я миссия по выводу широкополосных спутников на низкую околоземную орбиту. Старт с площадки 4E на базе космических сил Ванденберг произошел в 9:39:06 по тихоокеанскому времени (12:39:06 по восточному времени / 16:39:06 по всемирному координированному времени).

title_ru: Голос на орбите | Разговор с космонавтами в космосе | ЕКА исследует № 20
summary_ru:
Видео: 
			00:23:49
